title: The Sweetest Journey
premise: A tiny astronaut embarks on an intergalactic adventure, exploring vibrant candy planets and facing sugary challenges.

chapters.title: Lollypop Landing
chapters.setting: A vibrant landscape of giant lollipops, swirling taffy rivers, and soft marshmallow clouds under a pastel sky. Everything glistens with sugary delight.
chapters.narration: You arrive on a planet made entirely of candy, its surface glistening with sugary delight. Your mission is to explore and find a path forward.

mission.description: Navigate the sweet terrain and find the giant gumball machine exit!
mission.success_text: You've successfully navigated the Lollypop Landing!
mission.fail_text: The sugary landscape proved too tricky. Try again!

chapters.title: Gummy Jungle Expedition
chapters.setting: A dense jungle of towering gummy bear trees, intertwined licorice vines, and chocolate rivers, with a faint sparkling sugar dust hanging in the air.
chapters.narration: Deeper into the candy world, you find a vibrant jungle teeming with strange, sweet life. You must gather rare candy samples for your research.

mission.description: Collect 5 rare gummy fruits scattered throughout the jungle!
mission.success_text: You've gathered all the precious gummy fruits!
mission.fail_text: Some gummy fruits remain elusive. Don't give up!

chapters.title: The Sour Starship Escape
chapters.setting: A dark, cavernous interior of a giant, sour-candy-themed alien starship, dimly lit by the glow of your helmet and flickering neon sweet lights. A sour crystal storm rages outside.
chapters.narration: You've accidentally stumbled upon a sour alien starship, home to mischievous candy creatures! You must clear the path and escape before its sugary defenses overwhelm you.

mission.description: Defeat all 7 Sour Sentinels to clear your escape route!
mission.success_text: You've neutralized the sour threat and escaped the starship!
mission.fail_text: The Sour Sentinels have overwhelmed you. Prepare for another attempt!

characters.hero: A tiny, brave astronaut in a sleek, white-and-orange spacesuit with a round, clear helmet. They carry a small, toy-like laser pistol.
characters.enemy_1: A wobbly, brightly colored gummy bear with mischievous, beady eyes and a slightly menacing grin, made of translucent candy.
characters.enemy_2: An angular, purple and green crystal creature made of sour candy, with sharp, jagged edges and glowing, acidic-green eyes.
characters.npc: A benevolent, portly figure with a crown made of glistening hard candy, a shimmering robe woven from spun sugar, and a friendly, welcoming smile.
characters.coin: A golden coin with a swirl design, resembling a wrapped piece of hard candy.
characters.health: A glowing, heart-shaped lollipop with a vibrant red center.
characters.key: A shiny, oversized chocolate bar, intricately molded with a decorative pattern.
characters.platform: Thick, fluffy waffle cones, golden-brown and slightly textured, or layered nougat squares.
characters.breakable: Blocks of brittle gingerbread or sparkling rock candy that appear to shatter easily.
characters.exit_door: A giant, transparent gumball machine filled with colorful gumballs, with a small opening at the bottom acting as the exit portal.
